name: Snyk Learn
description: Snyk Learn — free developer security education platform with interactive lessons on vulnerabilities, secure coding, and OWASP topics.

seo.title: Snyk Learn — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: Snyk Learn: Snyk Learn — free developer security education platform with interactive lessons on vulnerabilities, secure coding, and OWASP topics.

when_to_use: OWASP Top 10 interactive lesson assigned to engineering team
Secure coding training completed before security audit
SQL injection lesson used in developer onboarding curriculum
Free security course integrated into developer learning pathway
Hands-on vulnerability lab reinforcing AppSec policy training

pros: Free security training aimed directly at developers
Lessons tied to real CVEs and OWASP topics
Short lessons fit into existing dev schedules
cons: Content serves as a funnel to paid Snyk products
Coverage narrower than full security curricula
Less depth than dedicated security training vendors
review.verdict: Genuinely useful free developer security training; treat it as awareness-building, not certification.
review.best_for: Dev teams wanting free, bite-sized security awareness training aligned with OWASP risks.
review.not_for: Security pros wanting deep, vendor-neutral training or formally recognized certifications.
